CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-12-2007 Continued To Feb-01-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Quiet Title - Real Property.
Off Calendar Dec-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Lavina Ward #7077 (Department 218)

Appearances
Attorney, Joel Willard, is appearing on behalf of the plaintiff, 949 Market Street Associates, LLC., A Delaware Limited Liability Co.
Plaintiff's witness, Greg Johnson, is present

Defendant, All persons claiming any interest in, or, Lien Upon, The Real Property Herein Described, is not present.
(Default was entered on 10/18/07 as to the defendant)

This cause came on calendar this day for a Quiet Tittle-Real Property. Greg Johnson is sworn.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court signs the Findings of Fact and Conclusion of Law and Judgment. See scann judgment for full details of the description of the property.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-25-2007 Continued To Dec-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
